MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 1, 2002. SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY 10/21/2002, SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY DUE 10/28/2002.
